entries.name: tax-sync-rates-taxjar
entries.purpose: Weekly Monday 03:00 UTC: pull TaxJar's rate catalog + upsert into tax_rates. New rates get effective_from = today; changed rates split into old (effective_to = today) + new.

entries.name: tax-sync-rates-avalara
entries.purpose: Weekly Tuesday 03:00 UTC: pull Avalara's rate catalog. Spread from TaxJar to avoid concurrent API pressure.

entries.name: tax-sync-rates-stripe-tax
entries.purpose: Weekly Wednesday 03:00 UTC: pull Stripe Tax's rate registry. Stripe Tax manages rates internally, but we snapshot for our own audit trail.

entries.name: tax-expire-exemptions
entries.purpose: Nightly 01:00 UTC: find verified exemptions with valid_until <= today + transition to verification_status='expired'.

entries.name: tax-notify-expiring
entries.purpose: Daily 08:00 UTC: find exemptions expiring in 60/30/7 days + fire TaxExemptionExpiringNotification cadence. Customer + tenant admin receive.

entries.name: tax-purge-calculations
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC: migrate calculations > 7 years old (10 for Enterprise) to tax_calculations_archive linked to invoice_lines_archive. NEVER hard-deletes inside the module.

entries.name: tax-reconcile-calculations
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 05:00 UTC: spot-check 1% of the past week's calculations against provider re-computation. Divergence triggers TaxCalculationDriftDetectedNotification.

entries.name: tax-open-circuit-breaker-half-open
entries.purpose: Every 10 min: sweep tax_provider_configs where circuit_breaker_open_until <= now() AND still marked open. Transition to HALF_OPEN + dispatch a probe. NOTE: the primary trigger for closing a breaker is a successful CalculateTaxForInvoiceLineJob; this sweep is a safety net for cases where the delayed enqueue was lost.
